headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations: No Ground Truth' design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are available for next metrics review
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you'll need them before the next Big Rock TR and MBR dashboard review

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079 (Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, it's in To Do with no due date, and evals are a key 26.4+ deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR. Zero-meeting days like today are rare — use the focus time.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evaluations design doc (AE-1079); Jordan is listed as the patterns/evals contributor in the Big Rock TR
Confirm any ML/scoring model dependencies for generated evaluations without ground truth

must_report_status.note: Have a status update ready; evals were a demo topic in the last Big Rock TR and leadership is tracking 26.4+ deliverables

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — open customer escalations are invisible. Fix credentials ASAP or raise with IT.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is broken (empty password) — no telemetry data for MBR dashboard or funnel health reviews.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of drifting. Consider setting a target date aligned with the next Big Rock TR cycle.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the latest TR — monitor for any spillover asks that could land on your plate.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility into customer escalations (Salesforce) and product metrics (Snowflake) so the team isn't flying blind.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable due to broken Snowflake credentials; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today as it unblocks a key 26.4 deliverable.

slack_summary: Clear calendar today — best use of time is deep work on the Generated Evaluations (no ground truth) design doc (AE-1079), which is still in To Do and is a key 26.4 deliverable. Two urgent operational items: Salesforce auth is broken (escalations invisible) and Snowflake creds are empty (no metrics). Zero meetings today.
